summary: Comprehensive testing completed for RERA Compliance Manager application. Backend APIs are 100% functional (21/21 tests passed). Frontend navigation, forms, and core features work well with minor UI/UX improvements needed.

backend_issues.notes: All backend APIs are working perfectly. No issues found.

ui_bugs.issue: Registration form has timing issues with dropdown selection and form submission
Dashboard testid selector not consistently found after login

design_issues.issue: RERA branding could be more prominent on main pages
Could improve error handling for invalid page routes

passed_tests: Backend Health Check - API responding correctly
User Registration & Login - JWT authentication working
Project CRUD Operations - Create, Read, Update, Delete working
Construction Progress Tracking - Form-1 data entry working
Project Costs Management - Form-3, Form-4 data handling
Report Generation - All form types (1-6, Annexure-A)
Frontend Navigation - All 7 main pages accessible
Project Creation Form - UI form validation working
UI Design - Blue theme applied consistently

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (Core functionality working, minor UI improvements needed)

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvements needed: (1) Fix registration form dropdown timing issues, (2) Ensure consistent dashboard testid selector, (3) Enhance RERA branding visibility. All core functionality is working perfectly.
